layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. High whitespace. Minimalist approach with clear lines.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento or Swiss Grid with asymmetrical elements. Use CSS Grid with large gaps (gap-8 to gap-16).
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm to maintain a sharp, elegant, luxurious feel.

navigation.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050810]/70 border-b border-white/10

buttons.primary: bg-transparent border border-[#D1A954] text-[#D1A954] hover:bg-[#D1A954] hover:text-black transition-all duration-300 py-3 px-8 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-all duration-300 py-3 px-8 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest

cards_and_surfaces.style: Flat solid surfaces. No heavy shadows. 1px delicate borders.
cards_and_surfaces.classes: bg-[#0B1120] border border-white/10 p-8 hover:border-[#D1A954]/30 transition-colors

inputs.style: Minimalist underline or 1px subtle border, dark background.
inputs.classes: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 text-white focus:border-[#D1A954] focus:ring-0 rounded-none px-0 py-3 outline-none transition-colors w-full

motion_and_interactions.global: Subtle, cinematic, and slow. No bouncy or rapid animations.
motion_and_interactions.hover_effects: Opacity changes, subtle border color shifts (white/10 to Gold), slow translation (-translate-y-1).
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade-in with slow upward drift for text elements.

media_and_images.hero_overlay: bg-black/50 to bg-black/70 to ensure text readability while letting the image breathe.

coming_soon_bg.description: Abstract gold chandelier. Use as a mysterious, elegant background for the Coming Soon page.

home_hero.description: Elegant Viennese ball scene, young people, gold lighting.

info_section.description: Silhouette of a young elegant couple waltzing in a dark majestic hall.
info_section.placement: Infos Page or Home Info Teaser Section

coming_soon.concept: A cinematic, dark, and mysterious entry point. Central focus is the newsletter signup.
coming_soon.functionality: Email input field acts as a secret gate. If 'LBALL2027' is entered as the email address, redirect/grant access to the full site.

home.concept: The grand reveal. Huge high-quality hero image with dark overlay, serif typography, elegant layout.
sections: Hero with Subtitle ('Der erste Ball Wiens, der die Lehre ins Rampenlicht stellt') & Call to Action

infos.concept: Deep dive into the vision. Lots of whitespace, asymmetric text-image pairing.

tickets.concept: Placeholder page. Elegant 'Available Soon' message centered on screen with gold accents.

contact.concept: Minimalist contact form. Clean lines, dark inputs.

admin.concept: Functional but keeping the dark mode aesthetic. Login screen + Dashboard to view/export Newsletter and Contact entries.

technical_instructions_for_main_agent: ALL text and content MUST be in German as requested.
Use standard Tailwind classes. For custom colors, extend tailwind.config.js with colors like jewel-blue (#050810), jewel-gold (#D1A954), jewel-silver (#C0C0C0).
Import 'Playfair Display' and 'Manrope' via Google Fonts in index.html or global css.
Implement the Coming Soon gate using a simple React state or context. If the email input value equals 'LBALL2027', set authenticated=true and route to the main site.
For all interactive elements, ADD the `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='newsletter-submit', data-testid='nav-infos').
Keep borders to 1px. Avoid heavy drop shadows. Use border-white/10 for subtle separation.
Ensure the hero images have a 'bg-black/50' to 'bg-black/70' overlay so the elegant typography stays readable.
All components MUST be built in pure React + Tailwind (.jsx or .js files, NO TypeScript). Use Shadcn ONLY for complex interaction logic if needed, but restyle to fit the luxury dark theme.
Use `framer-motion` for the required subtle fade-in and hover animations.
